name: Brain Core
description: Generic bucket-based memory system with LLM classification. Captures thoughts, classifies them into configurable buckets, and provides semantic search.

storage.dbPath.label: Database Path
storage.dbPath.help: Path to the LanceDB database directory

buckets.label: Buckets
buckets.help: List of bucket names for organizing thoughts

embedding.apiKey.label: Embedding API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for embeddings (Gemini keys start with AI, otherwise OpenAI)

classifier.apiKey.label: Classifier API Key
classifier.apiKey.help: API key for LLM classification (uses OpenClaw gateway if not set)

confidenceThreshold.label: Confidence Threshold
confidenceThreshold.help: Minimum confidence score for automatic routing (0.0-1.0)

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Passively capture noteworthy info from conversations (default: off)

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant memories into system prompt before each agent turn (default: off)

autoRecallLimit.label: Auto-Recall Limit
autoRecallLimit.help: Max memories to inject per turn

autoRecallMinScore.label: Auto-Recall Min Score
autoRecallMinScore.help: Minimum similarity score for auto-recalled memories

buckets.description: List of bucket names for organizing thoughts

baseURL.description: Custom base URL for OpenAI-compatible APIs

apiKey.description: API key for classification (uses gateway token if not set)

autoCapture.description: Passively capture noteworthy info from conversations (default: false)

autoRecall.description: Inject relevant memories into system prompt before each agent turn (default: false)

autoRecallLimit.description: Max memories to inject when autoRecall is enabled

autoRecallMinScore.description: Minimum similarity score for auto-recalled memories
